---
title: "Query Garden Python Wrapper Example"
author: "Nakul R. Padalkar"
format: html
filters:
  - query-garden
query-garden:
  databases:
    - name: hr
      sql-file-path: "hr.sql"
---

## Generated From Python

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| output: asis
import sys
sys.path.append("../_extensions/query-garden/resources/python")
from querygarden import emit_sql_block

emit_sql_block(
    "select * from regions;",
    db="hr",
    dialect="postgresql",
)
```

## Generated From A SQL File

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| output: asis
from querygarden import emit_sql_block_from_file

emit_sql_block_from_file(
    "sample-query.sql",
    db="hr",
    dialect="mysql",
)
```
